---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new cheat or an improvement for Company Supplier
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

> 💡 Company Supplier is a **singleplayer** cheat / trainer menu for the **stable**
> release of Captain of Industry. Requests should fit that scope — multiplayer,
> anti-cheat bypassing, or experimental-branch-only features are out of scope.

**What cheat or improvement would you like?**
A clear and concise description of the feature. What should it let you do?

**Which tab does it belong in?**
- [ ] Resources
- [ ] General
- [ ] Generation
- [ ] Shipyard & Fleet
- [ ] Vehicles
- [ ] Terrain
- [ ] Weather
- [ ] A new tab / general menu improvement

**What problem does it solve?**
What are you trying to do in-game that's tedious or impossible right now?
E.g. "I want to instantly flatten a large area without dumping terrain by hand."

**How should it work?**
Describe the ideal behaviour — a button, a toggle, a slider/number input, a
world-click tool, etc. Mention any specific values, products, or limits involved.

**Alternatives you've considered**
Any current menu options or workarounds you already use, and why they fall short.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, mock-ups, references to similar mods/trainers, or anything else that
helps explain the request.
